name: innova-crm
description: Monorepo for CRM Antropométrico y Motor de Somatotipo

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:db --prefix server && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
